mapper.select:
select user_coupon_id, u.phone_number, c.title, is_used, used_at, received_at, o.order_no, expired_at from user_coupon uc join users u on uc.user_id = u.user_id join orders o on o.order_id = uc.order_id left join coupon c on c.coupon_id = uc.coupon_id where u.user_id = #{userId} --status-> 0代表当前可用的优惠券，1代表已经使用过或过期优惠券
and (is_used = 0 and expired_at > now())
and (is_used = 1 or now() > expired_at)
